title: Content Sprint 2026 03 09
content:
# Content Sprint — Week of 2026-03-09

Theme: Real Estate Recruiting (Week 2 momentum)

## 7-Day Publishing Plan

## Monday
- TikTok: Day 4 learning recap (value proposition)
- CTA: "Comment 'VALUE' and I’ll send my checklist"

## Tuesday
- IG Carousel: "5 signs your brokerage is capping your growth"
- IG Stories: poll ("What support matters most?")

## Wednesday
- TikTok: "Recruiting myth vs reality" (use weekend draft angle)

## Thursday
- YouTube Short: "The 100k agent profile in 30 seconds"

## Friday
- IG Reel: Week reflection + one recruiting lesson

## Saturday
- TikTok BTS: outreach workflow + non-sales discovery approach

## Sunday
- YouTube: Week recap (learning + outreach outcomes)

## Hook Bank (Ready to use)
1. "If you’re producing but still feel stuck, this is probably why."
2. "Most agents don’t need a new split — they need a better system."
3. "I’m not recruiting everyone. I’m looking for fit."
4. "Before you switch brokerages, ask this one question."
5. "What top-producing agents secretly complain about."

## Production Checklist
- [ ] Record 3 vertical videos in one batch
- [ ] Create 5 hooks + captions from hook bank
- [ ] Schedule at least 4 posts
- [ ] Add one CTA per post (comment/DM)
- [ ] Track top post by saves + comments
